category_sources: Official GitHub README describes stream and packet I/O abstractions for TCP, telnet, UDP, SSL/TLS, serial, IPMI SOL, and more
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is gensio - General Stream I/O
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points users to USING and man page documentation
Official repository contains USING.rst and docs directory
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cminyard/gensio, so repo is returned as null per instruction
